label: safe
description: Smart home device manual - mentions unlock/security but is legitimate documentation
content:
SmartLock Pro User Manual

Safety Instructions

Never share your unlock codes with unauthorized persons. The SmartLock Pro uses 256-bit encryption to secure your home.

Basic Operations

To unlock the door, use the companion app or enter your PIN on the keypad. The door will automatically lock after 30 seconds.

Troubleshooting

If the lock fails to respond, check the battery level. Low batteries may prevent the unlock mechanism from functioning properly.

For security emergencies, contact local authorities.
